title: Broadband Terahertz Time-domain Spectroscopy of Quantum Materials in a Dilution Refrigerator
author_string: Robert J. Vukelich, Tenzin Norden, Tracy G. Hastings, Mohan Giri, Michelle Caldwell et al.
abstract: We have constructed a terahertz time domain spectroscopy system using a Bluefors dilution refrigerator with a 7 T split-coil magnet. Using a gallium arsenide single quantum well sample, terahertz waveforms were measured at 145 mK in a magnetic field range from 0 to 6 Tesla to measure cyclotron resonance. Effective mass is found to be $0.073 m_{e}$, which is larger than the commonly accepted bulk value of $0.068 m_{e}$.
